name: Clarity – Modern Guidance, Grounded in Wisdom
description:
• Built a multilingual RAG-based guidance platform that retrieves and reranks Bhagavad Gita verses using Top-K semantic search to deliver contextually relevant answers for modern-life queries.

• Developed an end-to-end AI pipeline where retrieved verses are processed through LLM-based reasoning to generate grounded responses with real-time TTS speech output across 11 regional languages.

• Improved scalability and response reliability by serving static scripture data from the frontend and engineering an async FastAPI + SSE streaming backend with background warmup orchestration.
